home.badge: AI Learning OS · free · open source
home.title: Master any book
home.subtitle: Drop in a textbook. Get a citation-grounded summary, audio, and an adaptive quiz that hunts down exactly what you don't know yet.
home.notesLangHint: Your summary and quiz will be in this language.
home.noValid: No supported files. Use PDF, DOCX, TXT or MD.
stats.sub: Live, open, real metrics across the whole platform.
demo.title: How CruxAI works — 60 seconds
home.dropHint: PDF · DOCX · TXT · MD — up to {files} files, {mb} MB total
home.over: Over the limit — remove files or compress them first.
home.tips.title: Best results — shrink big files first:
home.tips.1: Upload one chapter at a time, not the whole book.
home.tips.2: Use text-based files — scanned images won't work yet.
home.tips.3: Compress large PDFs (iLovePDF / Smallpdf) or remove heavy images.
